TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-pear5__awi_ a basi_
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: hayzani 'aehae' ka mae'iyaeh kamamanraan 'am rokrok ka boway sa'oewaz o 'am rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: hajz~ðani ʔæhæʔ ka mæʔijæh kamamanraan ʔam rokrok ka βowaj s~θaʔœwaz~ð o ʔam rokrok ka βowaj.
S.FORM: hayzani 'aehae' ka mae'iyaeh kamamanraan 'am rokrok ka boway sa'oewaz o 'am rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: hajz~ðani ʔæhæʔ ka mæʔijæh kamamanraan ʔam rokrok ka βowaj s~θaʔœwaz~ð o ʔam rokrok ka βowaj.
S.TRANSL: 現在有一個男人摘水果.
Now there was a man picking fruits.

S.FORM: mwai' 'aehae' mae'iyaeh ka 'ima hoehoe ka 'a Siri'.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ʔæhæʔ mæʔijæh ka ʔima hœhœ ka ʔa ʃiriʔ.
S.FORM: mwai' 'aehae' mae'iyaeh ka 'ima hoehoe ka 'a Siri'.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ʔæhæʔ mæʔijæh ka ʔima hœhœ ka ʔa ʃiriʔ.
S.TRANSL: 來了一個拉著山羊的人.

TRANSL.notes: (There) came a person pulling a goat.

S.TRANSL: came a person pulling a goat.

S.FORM: may isason ray kaehoey pingi'.
S.PHON: maj is~θas~θon raj kæhœj piŋiʔ.
S.FORM: may isason ray kaehoey pingi'.
S.PHON: maj is~θas~θon raj kæhœj piŋiʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (他)經過那個樹下面.

S.TRANSL: 經過那個樹下面.

TRANSL.notes: (He) passed by there under the tree.

S.TRANSL: passed by there under the tree.

S.FORM: naw koSa'en bo boway bilis sahpih.
S.PHON: naw koʃaʔən βo βowaj βilis~θ s~θahpih.
S.FORM: naw koSa'en bo boway bilis sahpih.
S.PHON: naw koʃaʔən βo βowaj βilis~θ s~θahpih.

TRANSL.notes: (那個男人)碰了一下水果然後走了.

S.TRANSL: 碰了一下水果然後走了.

TRANSL.notes: (The man) touched the fruits and went away.

S.TRANSL: touched the fruits and went away.

S.FORM: mwai' 'aehae' ka 'a korkoring hiya' hayza koSa'en ka kapapama'an noka mae'iyaeh a sarak nak hini.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ʔæhæʔ ka ʔa korkoriŋ hijaʔ hajz~ða koʃaʔən ka kapapamaʔan noka mæʔijæh a s~θarak nak hini.
S.FORM: mwai' 'aehae' ka 'a korkoring hiya' hayza koSa'en ka kapapama'an noka mae'iyaeh a sarak nak hini.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ʔæhæʔ ka ʔa korkoriŋ hijaʔ hajz~ða koʃaʔən ka kapapamaʔan noka mæʔijæh a s~θarak nak hini.
S.TRANSL: 來了一個騎腳踏車的小孩, 就像這樣踩

TRANSL.notes: (There) came a child riding a vehicle which you stomp like this.

S.TRANSL: came a child riding a vehicle which you stomp like this.

S.FORM: sa saksakosiza sararakis.
S.PHON: s~θa s~θaks~θakos~θiz~ða s~θararakis~θ.
S.FORM: sa saksakosiza sararakis.
S.PHON: s~θa s~θaks~θakos~θiz~ða s~θararakis~θ.

TRANSL.notes: (那個男孩)東張西望往上看(那個男人).

S.TRANSL: 東張西望往上看 .

TRANSL.notes: (The boy) looked around and upward (to the man).

S.TRANSL: looked around and upward .

S.FORM: 'aehae' koSa'en ka kamamanraan m rokrok ka boway 'okay sahae'oe.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ koʃaʔən ka kamamanraan m rokrok ka βowaj ʔokaj s~θahæʔœ.
S.FORM: 'aehae' koSa'en ka kamamanraan m rokrok ka boway 'okay sahae'oe.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ koʃaʔən ka kamamanraan m rokrok ka βowaj ʔokaj s~θahæʔœ.
S.TRANSL: 摘水果的人沒有往下看.
The man picking fruits did not look downward.

S.FORM: a noka a korkoring sikarma' 'aehae' koSa'en kala' ka 'a boway pama'en ila.
S.PHON: a noka a korkoriŋ s~θikarmaʔ ʔæhæʔ koʃaʔən kalaʔ ka ʔa βowaj pamaʔən ila.
S.FORM: a noka a korkoring sikarma' 'aehae' koSa'en kala' ka 'a boway pama'en ila.
S.PHON: a noka a korkoriŋ s~θikarmaʔ ʔæhæʔ koʃaʔən kalaʔ ka ʔa βowaj pamaʔən ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩偷了一籃, 載走了.
The child took away one basket and rode off.

S.FORM: sipanraan 'ita' koSaen ka tinawa'an batbato'an ki hinghae'.
S.PHON: s~θipanraan ʔitaʔ koʃæn ka tinawaʔan βatβatoʔan ki hiŋhæʔ.
S.FORM: sipanraan 'ita' koSaen ka tinawa'an batbato'an ki hinghae'.
S.PHON: s~θipanraan ʔitaʔ koʃæn ka tinawaʔan βatβatoʔan ki hiŋhæʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (小孩騎著它的腳踏車)經過一條石頭路.

S.TRANSL: 經過一條石頭路.

TRANSL.notes: (The child rode his bike) through a stony road.

S.TRANSL: through a stony road.

S.FORM: a mwai' naehaen 'aehae' koSa'en ka a kabinao' hinghae' ma papamaan nak hini koSa'en ka a nonak sarakan ka kapapama'an.
S.PHON: a mwaiʔ næhæn ʔæhæʔ koʃaʔən ka a kaβinaoʔ hiŋhæʔ ma papamaan nak hini koʃaʔən ka a nonak s~θarakan ka kapapamaʔan.
S.FORM: a mwai' naehaen 'aehae' koSa'en ka a kabinao' hinghae' ma papamaan nak hini koSa'en ka a nonak sarakan ka kapapama'an.
S.PHON: a mwaiʔ næhæn ʔæhæʔ koʃaʔən ka a kaβinaoʔ hiŋhæʔ ma papamaan nak hini koʃaʔən ka a nonak s~θarakan ka kapapamaʔan.
S.TRANSL: 又來了一個女孩像這樣踩著腳踏車來.

TRANSL.notes: (There) came a girl also riding a vehicle which you stomp like this.

S.TRANSL: came a girl also riding a vehicle which you stomp like this.

S.FORM: hiza 'am kaklepiih rima' pon'aisin seiti' ka 'a tatpo' sahae' ila ray rai' ray raan isaa.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ʔam kakləpiih rimaʔ ponʔais~θin s~θəitiʔ ka ʔa tatpoʔ s~θahæʔ ila raj raiʔ raj raan is~θaa.
S.FORM: hiza 'am kaklepiih rima' pon'aisin seiti' ka 'a tatpo' sahae' ila ray rai' ray raan isaa.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ʔam kakləpiih rimaʔ ponʔais~θin s~θəitiʔ ka ʔa tatpoʔ s~θahæʔ ila raj raiʔ raj raan is~θaa.

TRANSL.notes: (他們兩個)在途中相遇, (其中一個)碰到帽子 (使得帽子)掉在地上.

S.TRANSL: 在途中相遇, 碰到帽子 掉在地上.

TRANSL.notes: (Both of them) met along the way; (one of them) touched the hat (causing it) to fall on the ground.

S.TRANSL: met along the way; touched the hat to fall on the ground.

S.FORM: hiza kamamanraan korkoring hibih sakosizah.
S.PHON: hiz~ða kamamanraan korkoriŋ hiβih s~θakos~θiz~ðah.
S.FORM: hiza kamamanraan korkoring hibih sakosizah.
S.PHON: hiz~ða kamamanraan korkoriŋ hiβih s~θakos~θiz~ðah.
S.TRANSL: 男孩回頭看.
The child turned his head around and saw.

S.FORM: nisia ka kapapama'an rima isaa sipatono' ila ray ta malben ila malben hiza karma' koSa'en ka 'a boway 'aehae' kala' sisaah ila ray 'a tinawa'an.
S.PHON: nis~θia ka kapapamaʔan rima is~θaa s~θipatonoʔ ila raj ta malβən ila malβən hiz~ða karmaʔ koʃaʔən ka ʔa βowaj ʔæhæʔ kalaʔ s~θis~θaah ila raj ʔa tinawaʔan.
S.FORM: nisia ka kapapama'an rima isaa sipatono' ila ray ta malben ila malben hiza karma' koSa'en ka 'a boway 'aehae' kala' sisaah ila ray 'a tinawa'an.
S.PHON: nis~θia ka kapapamaʔan rima is~θaa s~θipatonoʔ ila raj ta malβən ila malβən hiz~ða karmaʔ koʃaʔən ka ʔa βowaj ʔæhæʔ kalaʔ s~θis~θaah ila raj ʔa tinawaʔan.

TRANSL.notes: 那籃(被男孩)偷走的水果掉到地上.

S.TRANSL: 那籃 偷走的水果掉到地上.

TRANSL.notes: The basket of fruit that (the boy) had stolen fell on the ground.

S.TRANSL: The basket of fruit that had stolen fell on the ground.

S.FORM: hayza' mwai' sepat ka korkoring ta tatilhaehael rokrok hayza' ka boway.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ mwaiʔ s~θəpat ka korkoriŋ ta tatilhæhæl rokrok hajz~ðaʔ ka βowaj.
S.FORM: hayza' mwai' sepat ka korkoring ta tatilhaehael rokrok hayza' ka boway.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ mwaiʔ s~θəpat ka korkoriŋ ta tatilhæhæl rokrok hajz~ðaʔ ka βowaj.
S.TRANSL: 來了四個小孩幫忙撿水果.
Came four children who helped pick the fruits.

S.FORM: taboe'en naehaen ray kala' tatilhaehaelen sitil'itol 'askanen ray kapapama'an nisia.
S.PHON: taβœʔən næhæn raj kalaʔ tatilhæhælən s~θitilʔitol ʔas~θkanən raj kapapamaʔan nis~θia.
S.FORM: taboe'en naehaen ray kala' tatilhaehaelen sitil'itol 'askanen ray kapapama'an nisia.
S.PHON: taβœʔən næhæn raj kalaʔ tatilhæhælən s~θitilʔitol ʔas~θkanən raj kapapamaʔan nis~θia.
S.TRANSL: 放到籃子裡, 提起來, 放到腳踏車.

TRANSL.notes: (They) put (the fruits) in the basket, lifted it, and put it on the bike.

S.TRANSL: put in the basket, lifted it, and put it on the bike.

S.FORM: ka manraan ila.
S.PHON: ka manraan ila.
S.FORM: ka manraan ila.
S.PHON: ka manraan ila.

TRANSL.notes: (男孩)走了.

S.TRANSL: 走了.

TRANSL.notes: (The boy) walked away.

S.TRANSL: walked away.

S.FORM: manraan 'okik koza' 'oSa'an.
S.PHON: manraan ʔokik koz~ðaʔ ʔoʃaʔan.
S.FORM: manraan 'okik koza' 'oSa'an.
S.PHON: manraan ʔokik koz~ðaʔ ʔoʃaʔan.

TRANSL.notes: (當那個男孩)沒有走多遠,

S.TRANSL: 沒有走多遠,

TRANSL.notes: (When the boy) had not gone long/far,

S.TRANSL: had not gone long/far,

S.FORM: nisia ka tatpo' haysia ray tinawa'an.
S.PHON: nis~θia ka tatpoʔ hajs~θia raj tinawaʔan.
S.FORM: nisia ka tatpo' haysia ray tinawa'an.
S.PHON: nis~θia ka tatpoʔ hajs~θia raj tinawaʔan.
S.TRANSL: 他的帽子還在路上.
His hat was still on the ground.

S.FORM: hayza' too' sahoeroe' ka tatpo'.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ tooʔ s~θahœrœʔ ka tatpoʔ.
S.FORM: hayza' too' sahoeroe' ka tatpo'.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ tooʔ s~θahœrœʔ ka tatpoʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 有三個 ... (他們)找到帽子.

S.TRANSL: 有三個 ... 找到帽子.

TRANSL.notes: There were three... (they) found the hat.

S.TRANSL: There were three... found the hat.

S.FORM: mari'in nisia pal'is'isen pal'is'isen.
S.PHON: mariʔin nis~θia palʔis~θʔis~θən palʔis~θʔis~θən.
S.FORM: mari'in nisia pal'is'isen pal'is'isen.
S.PHON: mariʔin nis~θia palʔis~θʔis~θən palʔis~θʔis~θən.

TRANSL.notes: (有一個男孩)拿起(帽子)拍一拍, 拍乾淨.

S.TRANSL: 拿起 拍一拍, 拍乾淨.

TRANSL.notes: (One of the boys) took (the hat and) shook it clean.

S.TRANSL: took shook it clean.

S.FORM: ta mintani' ila naehaen.
S.PHON: ta mintaniʔ ila næhæn.
S.FORM: ta mintani' ila naehaen.
S.PHON: ta mintaniʔ ila næhæn.
S.TRANSL: 那男孩停了一會兒.
"The boy stopped for a while.

S.FORM: sabowayen ila nisia ka 'a tatpo' sabowayen ka tatpo'.
S.PHON: s~θaβowajən ila nis~θia ka ʔa tatpoʔ s~θaβowajən ka tatpoʔ.
S.FORM: sabowayen ila nisia ka 'a tatpo' sabowayen ka tatpo'.
S.PHON: s~θaβowajən ila nis~θia ka ʔa tatpoʔ s~θaβowajən ka tatpoʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (一個男孩)走向 (那個小孩) 把帽子還給他.

S.TRANSL: 走向 把帽子還給他.

TRANSL.notes: (One of the boys) walked toward (the boy) and gave the hat (back to him).

S.TRANSL: walked toward and gave the hat .

S.FORM: isa mobay ila ka boway.
S.PHON: is~θa moβaj ila ka βowaj.
S.FORM: isa mobay ila ka boway.
S.PHON: is~θa moβaj ila ka βowaj.

TRANSL.notes: (小孩)給(他們)水果.

S.TRANSL: 給 水果.

TRANSL.notes: (The boy) gave (them) fruit.

S.TRANSL: gave fruit.

S.FORM: kayzaeh too' koSa'en ka 'a korkoring.
S.PHON: kajz~ðæh tooʔ koʃaʔən ka ʔa korkoriŋ.
S.FORM: kayzaeh too' koSa'en ka 'a korkoring.
S.PHON: kajz~ðæh tooʔ koʃaʔən ka ʔa korkoriŋ.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩很好.
The three children were good.

S.FORM: 'ima manraan ila rihani' ma 'a rima' nakhini koSa'en makaksiyae' a si'ael ka boway.
S.PHON: ʔima manraan ila rihaniʔ ma ʔa rimaʔ nakhini koʃaʔən makaks~θijæʔ a s~θiʔæl ka βowaj.
S.FORM: 'ima manraan ila rihani' ma 'a rima' nakhini koSa'en makaksiyae' a si'ael ka boway.
S.PHON: ʔima manraan ila rihaniʔ ma ʔa rimaʔ nakhini koʃaʔən makaks~θijæʔ a s~θiʔæl ka βowaj.

TRANSL.notes: (那些小孩)吃著水果高興的走了.

S.TRANSL: 吃著水果高興的走了.

TRANSL.notes: (The children) walked away happily eating the fruit.

S.TRANSL: walked away happily eating the fruit.

S.FORM: manraan rima' may hiza ray kaehoey pingi'.
S.PHON: manraan rimaʔ maj hiz~ða raj kæhœj piŋiʔ.
S.FORM: manraan rima' may hiza ray kaehoey pingi'.
S.PHON: manraan rimaʔ maj hiz~ða raj kæhœj piŋiʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)經過樹下面.

S.TRANSL: 經過樹下面.

TRANSL.notes: (They) walked away passing by under the tree.

S.TRANSL: walked away passing by under the tree.

S.FORM: isahiza ina rokrok koSa'en ka 'a boway hiza ray pingi'.
S.PHON: is~θahiz~ða ina rokrok koʃaʔən ka ʔa βowaj hiz~ða raj piŋiʔ.
S.FORM: isahiza ina rokrok koSa'en ka 'a boway hiza ray pingi'.
S.PHON: is~θahiz~ða ina rokrok koʃaʔən ka ʔa βowaj hiz~ða raj piŋiʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (那個)摘水果的(男人)在樹下.

S.TRANSL: 摘水果的 在樹下.

TRANSL.notes: (The man) picking fruits (was) there under the tree.

S.TRANSL: picking fruits there under the tree.

S.FORM: sope ila.
S.PHON: s~θopə ila.
S.FORM: sope ila.
S.PHON: s~θopə ila.

TRANSL.notes: (他)數 (籃子).

S.TRANSL: 數 .

TRANSL.notes: (He) counted (the baskets).

S.TRANSL: counted .

S.FORM: 'ampowa ila ma'an kaysa'an rokrok ka 'a boway.
S.PHON: ʔampowa ila maʔan kajs~θaʔan rokrok ka ʔa βowaj.
S.FORM: 'ampowa ila ma'an kaysa'an rokrok ka 'a boway.
S.PHON: ʔampowa ila maʔan kajs~θaʔan rokrok ka ʔa βowaj.

TRANSL.notes: 怎麼了? 我剛剛摘的水果(哪裡去了)?

S.TRANSL: 怎麼了? 我剛剛摘的水果 ?

TRANSL.notes: What's happened? (Where are) the fruits I just picked?

S.TRANSL: What's happened? the fruits I just picked?

S.FORM: hawka' hini 'aehae' kala' a.
S.PHON: hawkaʔ hini ʔæhæʔ kalaʔ a.
S.FORM: hawka' hini 'aehae' kala' a.
S.PHON: hawkaʔ hini ʔæhæʔ kalaʔ a.

TRANSL.notes: (他)不見了一籃.

S.TRANSL: 不見了一籃.

TRANSL.notes: (He) didn't see the (one) basket.

S.TRANSL: didn't see the basket.

S.FORM: saksakosiza ila 'oka'i 'ikoSa karma'en haysani hayno' ila.
S.PHON: s~θaks~θakos~θiz~ða ila ʔokaʔi ʔikoʃa karmaʔən hajs~θani hajnoʔ ila.
S.FORM: saksakosiza ila 'oka'i 'ikoSa karma'en haysani hayno' ila.
S.PHON: s~θaks~θakos~θiz~ða ila ʔokaʔi ʔikoʃa karmaʔən hajs~θani hajnoʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 他四下張望, 說, 被偷的那一籃現在在哪裡?

TRANSL.notes: He turned around and said, 'where is the stolen (basket) now?'

S.TRANSL: He turned around and said, 'where is the stolen now?'

S.FORM: hiza ray 'inaz'azem 'ima komoSa hayza too' korkoring marma' sasailin rihani' 'ima nak'ino a' 'oka' ila sekela'i.
S.PHON: hiz~ða raj ʔinaz~ðʔaz~ðəm ʔima komoʃa hajz~ða tooʔ korkoriŋ marmaʔ s~θas~θailin rihaniʔ ʔima nakʔino aʔ ʔokaʔ ila s~θəkəlaʔi.
S.FORM: hiza ray 'inaz'azem 'ima komoSa hayza too' korkoring marma' sasailin rihani' 'ima nak'ino a' 'oka' ila sekela'i.
S.PHON: hiz~ða raj ʔinaz~ðʔaz~ðəm ʔima komoʃa hajz~ða tooʔ korkoriŋ marmaʔ s~θas~θailin rihaniʔ ʔima nakʔino aʔ ʔokaʔ ila s~θəkəlaʔi.
S.TRANSL: 三個小孩把籃子藏在附近 我不知道在哪裡.

TRANSL.notes: Three children have hidden (the basket) nearby. Where (I) don't know.

S.TRANSL: Three children have hidden nearby. Where don't know.

S.FORM: isaa' kita' ila nanaw koSa nisia bibilis boway 'aehae' mae'iyaeh 'aehae'.
S.PHON: is~θaaʔ kitaʔ ila nanaw koʃa nis~θia βiβilis~θ βowaj ʔæhæʔ mæʔijæh ʔæhæʔ.
S.FORM: isaa' kita' ila nanaw koSa nisia bibilis boway 'aehae' mae'iyaeh 'aehae'.
S.PHON: is~θaaʔ kitaʔ ila nanaw koʃa nis~θia βiβilis~θ βowaj ʔæhæʔ mæʔijæh ʔæhæʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他拿水果給他們一人一個.
He took one fruit for each one of them.

S.FORM: manraan 'am si'ael.
S.PHON: manraan ʔam s~θiʔæl.
S.FORM: manraan 'am si'ael.
S.PHON: manraan ʔam s~θiʔæl.
S.TRANSL: 他們邊走邊吃.
Which they ate as they were on their way.

S.FORM: isaa ma'an kita' papay isaa papay hini'.
S.PHON: is~θaa maʔan kitaʔ papaj is~θaa papaj hiniʔ.
S.FORM: isaa ma'an kita' papay isaa papay hini'.
S.PHON: is~θaa maʔan kitaʔ papaj is~θaa papaj hiniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我所看到的故事就到這裡.

TRANSL.notes: (My story about) what I've seen ends here.

S.TRANSL: what I've seen ends here.
